title: Pity To The Prostrate.
content:
'Tis worse than barbarous cruelty to show
    No part of pity on a conquered foe.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Pity To The Prostrate."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
